ValidationRule.description: validation on case to block the case re-opening manually based on Closure Confirmation Status
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c), CONTAINS($Label.CCCM_Closure_Confmn_Status_RTdevName, RecordType.DeveloperName), ISCHANGED(Status), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Status))), NOT(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status), 'Closed')), ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Reopened'), OR( ISPICKVAL(Closure_confirmation_status__c, 'Closure confirmed by customer'), ISPICKVAL(Closure_confirmation_status__c, 'No reply from customer')))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can’t reopen the case, please create a new case using New request button.
